log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Loxodon — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+6=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Loxodon — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 31 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:18+6=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Loxodon — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 47 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===

=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Loxodon — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Loxodon — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Loxodon — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.

Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.

=== ROUND 4 ===

Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.

=== ROUND 5 ===

--- Archmage's turn ---

→ Loxodon — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 26 fire damage + .
